## Summary
- publish the next content-calendar post: `OpenClaw Consultant: When DIY Isn't Enough`
- add a dedicated blog page with SEO metadata, Article + FAQ schema, internal links, and CTA
- update `BLOG_POSTS`, static routing, and regenerate `docs/` via `make build`

## Testing

- `make build`
